_doc: Canonical, versioned map from the 15 unified scope-of-business categories to an affluence TILT weight. Positive = discretionary/premium-leaning surface; negative = value/necessity-anchored surface. This is a COMPOSITION signal of the catchment served, NOT a volume or income claim (thesis #1). Department/Value/Outlet and Supermarket are down-weighted because they anchor value-oriented, mass-market centres. Versioned: bump 'version' on edit.
